# Teaching
Together with [Lars Bertram](https://www.liga.uni-luebeck.de/) and
[Beatriz Vieira Mourato](https://beatrizvm.github.io/) I teach the
course _Molecular Bioinformatics_ on methods in genomics at [Lübeck
University](https://www.uni-luebeck.de/). The course consists of
lectures and practicals. The practicals are centered on sequence
analysis on the Unix command line, as detailed in the text book
[_Biofinformatics for Evolutionary
Biologists_](https://link.springer.com/book/10.1007/978-3-031-20414-2).
